title: HAUSPROFI Measuring Cups and Spoons Set, 13 Pieces Premium Stainless Steel Measuring Spoons with Ruler Scoop/Clip for Baking, Liquid and Solid

description: Product Description KEY FEATURES High-Quality Stainless Steel: Made of food-grade premium 304 stainless steel, odorless, and safe to contact food directly. Clear Marks: Each spoon and cup is clearly marked with ml, teaspoon, or tablespoons measurements. Well finished: Well polish and deburr on the surface of cup and spoon, modern and stylish. Extra Coffee Bag Clip Comes with a long-handle scoop, which features a clip design, making it convenient to seal the coffee or food bag and keep the food fresh. Leveler for More Accurate The leveler will help you to get a more accurate amount with less time, And it has a measuring scale along the edge, allowing you to measure food size when you need it. Stackable and Easy Storing Features stackable design and comes with a buckle designed ring for storage and hanging, which can be easily removed when you need to use the spoons separately. PACKAGE INCLUDES Measurements of the Cups Include: - 1/8 cup (30ml) - 1/4 cup (60ml) - 1/3 cup (80ml) - 1/2 cup (125ml) - 1 cup (250ml) Measurements of the Spoons Include: - 1/8 tsp (0.63ml) - 1/4 tsp (1.25ml) - 1/2 tsp (2.5ml) - 1 tsp (5ml) - 1/2 tbsp (7.5ml) - 1 tbsp (15ml) Extra Measuring Tools - 1 coffee scoop with clip (20ml) - 1 measuring leveler - 1 buckle-designed ring Measuring Cups and Spoons Set of 13 Measuring Cups and Spoons Set of 14 (with Soft Silicone Handle) Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 4,252 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,178 Price £12.89 £ 12 . 89 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 Package 1/8 cup (30ml), 1/4 cup (60ml), 1/3 cup (80ml), 1/2 cup (125ml), 1 cup (250ml) & 1/8 tsp (0.63ml), 1/4 tsp (1.25ml), 1/2 tsp (2.5ml), 1 tsp (5ml), 1 / 2tbsp (7.5ml), 1 tbsp (15ml), 1 measuring leveler, and 1 coffee scoop with clip 1 cup (250 ml), 1/2 cup (125 ml), 1/3 cup (80 ml) , 1/4 cup (60 ml), 1/8 cup (30 ml), 1 tbsp(15 ml), 1/2 tbsp(7.5 ml), 1 tsp(5 ml), 1/2 tsp(2.5 ml), 1/4 tsp(1.25 ml), 1 coffee scoop with clip, 1 measuring level, 2 O rings for easy storage
